title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at Mindspace Business Parks REIT

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at Mindspace Business Parks REIT
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Real Estate Agent looking for your next big career move? Mindspace Business Parks REIT in Bengaluru offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Mindspace Business Parks REIT:
Mindspace Business Parks REIT is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Lease Administration

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mindspace Business Parks REIT!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
